venues.label: Infinex sUSD
venues.risk_note: smart-account custody · APR is stub pending team confirmation (recon §4 #2)

venues.label: Curve sUSD/sUSDe LP
venues.risk_note: 0.1% base (trading fees, lagged) + 0.1% CRV/CVX rewards · IL if peg moves

venues.label: Buy & hold to peg
venues.risk_note: 36.1% gross at $0.7348 → $1.00; annualized depends on time-to-peg (12mo horizon shown)

venues.label: Burn sUSD to repay SNX debt
venues.risk_note: one-shot — $1 of debt forgiveness per $0.7348 of sUSD. Gated: requires the staker to be at 100% of original debt collateralized in sUSD (Synthetix contributor confirmed 2026-05-05). Most stakers are below this threshold, so this yield is not currently accessible to most of the cohort.
venues.audience: SNX stakers at 100% original-debt threshold only

venues.label: SLP Vault
venues.risk_note: New contract, sUSD-only deposits, locks the sUSD (no new minting). Synthetix contributor (2026-05-05) confirmed intent to absorb most of the legacy sUSD supply. APR not announced. Audit status not disclosed.

venues.label: sUSD Staking Rewards (5M SNX)
venues.lock: principal unlocked Apr 19; SNX rewards vest 3mo linear (~Apr 19 → Jul 19, 2026)
venues.risk_note: In linear release window — SNX rewards distribute from 2026-04-19 to ~2026-07-19. Stakers have a financial incentive to delay exit until window close. No new deposits accepted; yield realised is the unvested portion of the 5M SNX pool.
